subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and its contents were understood. Upon the ascension of thy revered mother, a prayer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما واصل و مضمون مفهوم شد بمجرد صعود حضرت والده مناجاتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
